fields.label: User
fields.description: The user who provided consent

fields.label: User Full Name
fields.description: Auto-fetched from user

fields.label: Consent Type
fields.options:
Data Processing
Marketing Communications
Third Party Sharing
International Transfer
Profiling
Automated Decision Making
Cookies
Analytics
Newsletter
SMS Notifications
Push Notifications
Email Notifications
Phone Calls
Location Tracking
Biometric Data
Health Data
Financial Data
KYC Verification
Payment Processing
Other
fields.description: Type of consent being recorded

fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Pending Verification
Active
Withdrawn
Expired
Superseded
Invalid
fields.description: Current status of the consent

fields.label: Tenant
fields.description: The tenant this consent belongs to

fields.label: KYC Profile
fields.description: Associated KYC profile if applicable

fields.label: Purpose
fields.description: Brief purpose for data processing (e.g., 'Order Processing')

fields.label: Purpose Description
fields.description: Detailed description of why consent is needed

fields.label: Legal Basis
fields.options:
Consent
Contract Performance
Legal Obligation
Vital Interests
Public Interest
Legitimate Interest
fields.description: KVKK Article 5/Article 6 legal basis

fields.label: Data Categories
fields.description: Categories of personal data processed (e.g., Name, Email, Phone)

fields.label: Processing Description
fields.description: Description of how data will be processed

fields.label: Retention Period
fields.description: How long data will be retained (e.g., '2 years', 'Until account deletion')

fields.label: Consent Version
fields.description: Version of the consent form (e.g., 'v1.2')

fields.label: Consent Text
fields.description: Exact text that was presented to the user

fields.label: Privacy Policy Version
fields.description: Version of privacy policy at time of consent

fields.label: Terms of Service Version
fields.description: Version of terms of service at time of consent

fields.label: Consent Given
fields.description: Whether consent has been given

fields.label: Given At
fields.description: Timestamp when consent was given

fields.label: Given Via
fields.options:
Web Form
Mobile App
API
Checkbox
Verbal
Written Document
Email Confirmation
SMS Confirmation
Double Opt-in
Implicit
Other
fields.description: Method used to collect consent

fields.label: IP Address
fields.description: IP address of user when consent was given

fields.label: User Agent
fields.description: Browser/device user agent string

fields.label: Source
fields.description: Page or location where consent was collected

fields.label: Consent Withdrawn
fields.description: Whether consent has been withdrawn

fields.label: Withdrawn At
fields.description: Timestamp when consent was withdrawn

fields.label: Withdrawn Via
fields.options:
Preferences Page
Email Request
Support Ticket
API Request
Verbal Request
Written Request
Account Deletion
Data Subject Request
Other
fields.description: Method used to withdraw consent

fields.label: Withdrawal IP Address
fields.description: IP address when consent was withdrawn

fields.label: Withdrawal Reason
fields.description: Reason provided for withdrawing consent

fields.label: Data Deletion Requested
fields.description: Whether user requested deletion of associated data

fields.label: Third Party Sharing
fields.depends_on: eval:doc.consent_type=='Third Party Sharing' || doc.consent_type=='International Transfer' || doc.involves_third_party

fields.label: Involves Third Party
fields.description: Whether this consent involves third party data sharing

fields.label: Third Party Name
fields.description: Name of the third party receiving data

fields.label: Third Party Country
fields.description: Country where third party is located

fields.label: Transfer Safeguards
fields.options:
Adequacy Decision
Standard Contractual Clauses
Binding Corporate Rules
Explicit Consent
Necessary for Contract
Public Interest
Legal Claims
Vital Interests
Public Register
fields.description: Legal mechanism for international data transfer

fields.label: Third Party Purpose
fields.description: Purpose for sharing data with third party

fields.label: Has Expiry Date
fields.description: Whether this consent has an expiry date

fields.label: Expiry Date
fields.description: Date when consent expires

fields.label: Auto Renew
fields.description: Whether consent should be auto-renewed before expiry

fields.label: Renewal Reminder Sent
fields.description: Whether reminder was sent before expiry

fields.label: Consent Verified
fields.description: Whether consent has been verified (e.g., double opt-in)

fields.label: Verification Method
fields.options:
Email Link
SMS Code
Phone Call
Manual Review
Automatic
Not Required

fields.label: Verification Reference
fields.description: External reference for verification (e.g., confirmation token)

fields.label: Double Opt-in Completed
fields.description: Whether double opt-in process was completed

fields.label: Amended From
fields.description: Previous consent record this supersedes

fields.label: Amendment Reason
fields.description: Reason for amending/superseding previous consent

fields.label: Internal Notes
fields.description: Notes visible only to administrators
